introSection: Highway Coaster (Japanese: ハイウェイコースター) is a steel terrain roller coaster currently located at Japan Monkey Park in Inuyama, Aichi, Japan. It originally opened as Eagle Coaster in 1997, before being renamed around 2007.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: Grey track with yellow rails and grey supports.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The train is designed to resemble a car. It used to feature a more generic coaster train design with a golden eagle figure on the front.

sections.title: External links
sections.content: * Highway Coaster on the park's website (In Japanese)

fullText:
Highway Coaster (Japanese: ハイウェイコースター) is a steel terrain roller coaster currently located at Japan Monkey Park in Inuyama, Aichi, Japan. It originally opened as Eagle Coaster in 1997, before being renamed around 2007.



Grey track with yellow rails and grey supports.

The train is designed to resemble a car. It used to feature a more generic coaster train design with a golden eagle figure on the front.


 * Highway Coaster on the park's website (In Japanese)
